q: What are the most beautiful sights you have seen while travelling?
examiner_note: Đây là câu hỏi tổng kết về trải nghiệm du lịch. Giám khảo muốn nghe bạn kể về ít nhất 2-3 địa danh cụ thể và lý do bạn thấy chúng đẹp. Hãy đa dạng hóa các tính từ (vibrant, ancient, futuristic, colossal). Bạn có thể kết hợp giữa vẻ đẹp thiên nhiên và vẻ đẹp kiến trúc để câu trả lời thêm phong phú. Sử dụng cấu trúc 'One of the most... is...' hoặc 'I was particularly struck by...'.

band7.text: I’ve seen many beautiful things, but one of the most impressive was the Great Wall of China. It’s so long and powerful, stretching over the mountains. Another one is the beaches in Da Nang, Vietnam. The white sand and clear water are very peaceful and pretty.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp, có ví dụ cụ thể về cả kiến trúc và thiên nhiên. Sử dụng từ vựng ở mức ổn (impressive, powerful, peaceful).

band8.text: During my travels, I’ve been lucky enough to witness some truly spectacular sights. One that stands out is the ancient city of Kyoto in Japan, especially during the cherry blossom season—the pink flowers against the traditional temples were breathtaking. I was also deeply impressed by the Swiss Alps; the sheer scale of those snow-capped peaks is something you can’t fully appreciate until you see it in person.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng mô tả sinh động (spectacular, stands out, cherry blossom season, snow-capped peaks). Cách diễn đạt mạch lạc và tự nhiên.

band9.text: I’ve encountered a plethora of magnificent sights, but two remain particularly etched in my mind. The first is the ethereal Northern Lights in Iceland—watching the green and violet hues dance across the Arctic sky was a profoundly moving experience. The second would be the architectural marvel of the Taj Mahal at dawn. The way the white marble glows in the soft morning light is simply sublime and exemplifies human craftsmanship at its finest. These sights are not just visually stunning; they evoke a deep sense of wonder and humility.
band9.note: Vốn từ vựng cực kỳ phong phú và học thuật (plethora, etched in mind, ethereal, hues, architectural marvel, sublime, exemplifies, craftsmanship, evokes, humility). Cách lập luận và mô tả mang tính nghệ thuật cao.

v.example: The museum offers a plethora of interesting exhibits.
The image of the accident is forever etched in my mind.
The music had an ethereal quality that was very relaxing.
The Burj Khalifa is a true architectural marvel of the 21st century.
The view from the top was simply sublime.

v.meaning: lấy ví dụ cho/minh họa cho
v.example: His work exemplifies the best of modern design.

v.meaning: sự lành nghề/kỹ xảo thủ công
v.example: You can see the high quality of craftsmanship in this furniture.
Old photos often evoke a sense of nostalgia.
He accepted the award with great humility.
Many tourists flock to Japan during the cherry blossom season.
The snow-capped peaks were visible from the hotel window.
The fireworks display was truly spectacular.
The sunset over the sea was breathtaking.
The cathedral is a magnificent example of Gothic architecture.
Greece and Italy are famous for their ancient ruins.
New Zealand is famous for its stunning landscapes.
The sunset was full of vibrant hues of red and orange.
The lake's water was pristine and clear.
The rugged coastline of Maine is very picturesque.
The majestic Himalayas are a sight to behold.
The journey was an unforgettable adventure.

v.meaning: đầy tuyệt vọng/khiến người khác nể sợ
v.example: The Grand Canyon is an awe-inspiring natural wonder.
The statue is a colossal piece of art.

v.meaning: thuộc về tương lai/hiện đại phá cách
v.example: The new airport design is very futuristic.
The limestone caverns were filled with stalactites.
Scuba diving allows you to see the beautiful coral reefs.
Angkor Wat is a UNESCO World Heritage site.
The Victoria Falls is one of the seven natural wonders of the world.
The islands are known for their unparalleled beauty.
The forest had an enchanting atmosphere at night.
Every turn of the road offered a new scenic vista.
The verdant valleys of Ireland are world-famous.
The azure waters of the tropical island were very inviting.
The shimmering stars lit up the night sky.
The temple is decorated with many intricate details.
The sheer scale of the project was overwhelming.
The sky seemed boundless from the top of the tower.
The restaurant has a panoramic view of the whole city.
Building the pyramids was a monumental task.
The palace is famous for its architectural grandeur.
The ancient temple inspired a sense of reverence.

v.meaning: còn nguyên sơ (chưa bị tàn phá)
v.example: The island has remained largely unspoilt by tourism.
I love the tranquility of the mountains in winter.

v.meaning: sự cô độc (yên tĩnh, thoải mái)
v.example: She enjoyed the solitude of her morning walk.
Traveling can be a perspective-shifting experience.
Living abroad was an eye-opening experience for him.
Her wanderlust has led her to visit thirty countries.
The museum is a treasure trove of ancient artifacts.

v.meaning: viên ngọc ẩn (nơi đẹp mà ít người biết)
v.example: This small cafe is a real hidden gem in the city.
Her recovery from the illness was nothing short of miraculous.
